sections.paragraph:
Original: טפח

Transliteration: ṭâphach

Phonetic: taw-fakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to extend, spread, trip, take quick little steps
    1. (Piel)
      1. to spread out
      2. to carry on the palms, dandle
      3. to rear children

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 821

Part(s) of speech: Verb
